defs: The quality or state of being serene; clearness and calmness; quietness; stillness; peace.
quotes: A general peace and serenity newly succeeded a general trouble.

defs: Calmness of mind; eveness of temper; undisturbed state; coolness; composure.
quotes: I can not see how any men should ever transgress those moral rules with confidence and serenity.
notes: ☞ Serenity is given as a title to the members of certain princely families in Europe; as, Your Serenity.
